name: low_vol_alternating
description: Period-2 alternating returns of +/- 0.001 (i.e., +/- 0.1%) across 20 days. Mean is exactly zero; population stdev equals the amplitude after the ×100 scaling. Chosen over a sin() shape because period-2 alternation gives a closed-form analytic stdev with no floating-point rounding at the sample level.
